title: Legacy backlog batch 2 dispositioned
body: Closed claims 63f816bb and b6698940 after batch 2. Legacy backlog dispositions: 2 graduated, 1 owner-gated, 2 stale-withdrawn. Also amended agent-collaboration.md section c for commit-window mutual verification and hook-output authority. Verification: targeted markdownlint pass, git diff --check pass, practice:fitness:strict-hard remains SOFT with 20 soft, 22 healthy, 8 ready-empty, hard 0, critical 0. No archive, split, shard, rename, move, or new buffer file.
